Dysphagia Knowledge Hub — 吞嚥困難知識庫

IDDSI Framework Guide Collection

The International Dysphagia Diet Standardisation Initiative (IDDSI) provides the globally recognised 8-level framework for classifying foods and drinks for people with dysphagia. This section covers every level in depth — from thin liquids (Level 0) to regular diet (Level 7) — with clinical applications, home testing methods, and practical meal preparation guidance.

All IDDSI Guides

  • IDDSI Framework — Complete Guide to All 8 Levels
  • How IDDSI Was Developed — The Story of Global Dysphagia Diet Standardisation (2010–2017)
  • IDDSI Levels 0, 1, 2 — Thin, Slightly Thick and Mildly Thick Liquids Complete Guide (2026)
  • IDDSI Level 3 (Moderately Thick) Complete Guide: Clinical Applications, Thickener Dosing, and Dehydration Prevention
  • IDDSI Level 4 (Pureed) — Complete Caregiver and Clinical Guide
  • IDDSI Level 5 — Minced and Moist: Complete Guide to Preparation, Testing, and Meal Planning
  • IDDSI Level 5 vs Level 6 — The Most-Confused Boundary, Explained
  • IDDSI Level 6 Soft and Bite-Sized: A Complete Clinical and Caregiver Guide
  • IDDSI Level 7 Easy to Chew: Complete Guide for Caregivers, Kitchens, and Early Dysphagia Patients
